data.title: PaperStreet Web Design marks 25 years of legal industry innovation. Founded by Peter Boyd, it started as a one-man operation.
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on January 12, 2026, PaperStreet Web Design, a prominent digital marketing agency specializing in the legal sector, celebrates its 25th anniversary. The company was established by attorney and entrepreneur Peter Boyd as a solo venture, growing over the years to cater exclusively to legal clients.

data.title: KBRA research shows $59.3B loans maturated in 2025, with 90% paying off, a slight increase from 85.6% in 2024.
data.description: KBRA has published a study focusing on the refinancing outcomes of $59.3 billion worth of loans from conduit and single-asset single-borrower (SASB) commercial mortgage-backed securities (CMBS) deals that reached maturity in 2025, surpassing the $56.2 billion that matured in 2024. In the case of U.S. conduit and SASB CMBS loans with 2025 maturity dates, close to 90% of the loans were successfully paid off. This percentage shows a slight uptick from 2024 when 85.6% of maturing loans were successfully refinanced.

data.title: Publix promotes Katie Scanlon to VP of Pharmacy, effective Feb. 1, 2026. CEO Kevin Murphy praises her leadership skills.
data.description: In Lakeland, Florida, Publix Super Markets CEO Kevin Murphy revealed the appointment of Katie Scanlon as the new vice president of pharmacy commencing on February 1, 2026. Murphy expressed his satisfaction with the decision, emphasizing Publix's commitment to internal advancement opportunities for employees. Scanlon, recognized for her remarkable leadership skills and commitment to team development, has been praised for her dedication to enhancing customer service. This move highlights Publix's emphasis on nurturing talent from within the company.

data.title: National Pediatric Cancer Foundation hosting Fashion Funds the Cure event on Feb 6 in Washington, D.C. to raise funds for pediatric cancer research.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in Washington, the National Pediatric Cancer Foundation (NPCF) announced that it will be hosting its renowned event, Fashion Funds the Cure, on February 6, 2026. This event will unite families, advocates, researchers, and supporters in a memorable evening aimed at raising funds for pediatric cancer research.

data.title: Wall Street analysts expect Wells Fargo to report Q4 earnings of $1.67/share (up from $1.43 last year), with revenue estimate of $21.66 billion ($20.38B last year). Wells Fargo's prime rate reduced to 6.75% from 7.00%. Wells Fargo's shares rose 0.4% to $95.95.
data.description: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE: WFC) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings on Wednesday, January 14. Analysts are projecting earnings of $1.67 per share, a jump from $1.43 per share a year ago. The consensus estimate for the bank's quarterly revenue is $21.66 billion, compared to $20.38 billion last year. Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. recently lowered its prime rate to 6.75% from 7.00% on Dec. 10. The company's stock closed at $95.95 on Friday, up by 0.4%. For more details and the latest analyst ratings, interested individuals can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website.

data.title: Travelzoo offers exclusive deal for U.S. club members: Luxurious Caribbean trip for 2 for $599.
data.description: Travelzoo® has recently revealed a new Club Offer for its U.S. Club Members, priced at $599. This luxurious Caribbean escape package is designed for two individuals and includes a range of top-tier amenities. This exclusive deal has been diligently vetted and carefully negotiated for discerning travel enthusiasts.

data.title: BTC price falls to 2-year low, losing to gold as debasement trade. Gold and silver set new all-time highs.
data.description: Bitcoin, once considered the go-to investment for safeguarding against debasement, has seen a decline in its price action. Meanwhile, gold and silver have reached record highs once again, according to recent analysis. This shift comes as BTC struggles while the precious metals surge.

data.title: B&O Railroad Museum presents restored American Freedom Train No. 1 to kick off America250 celebration.
data.description: In Baltimore, the B&O Railroad Museum revealed the restored American Freedom Train No. 1 (AFT No. 1) today. This locomotive, which pulled the American Freedom Train during the U.S. Bicentennial, has been presented as a gift to the nation to kick off the America250 celebration. A significant part of the 1976 Bicentennial, the locomotive has been brought back to its former glory to represent national unity in the present day. The unveiling ceremony featured speeches by The Honorable Marti and other key figures.

data.title: Cornerstone Building Brands' products from Ply Gem, Simonton Windows & Doors, and Mastic by Ply Gem will be featured in season 7 of Fixer to Fabulous.
data.description: In Cary, North Carolina, products from Cornerstone Building Brands, including Ply Gem, Simonton Windows & Doors, and Mastic by Ply Gem, were showcased on the seventh season of Fixer to Fabulous.

data.title: SEI in Cincinnati announces leadership transitions to honor legacy while advancing future; Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: SEI, a reputable management consulting firm known for providing innovative solutions, recently revealed leadership changes on January 12, 2026. The company, based in Cincinnati, is gearing up to transition to the next phase while paying tribute to its distinguished history. This move comes as SEI continues to uphold its commitment to delivering trustworthy outcomes.

data.title: Apple to use Google's Gemini AI models for Siri upgrades, stock unaffected.
data.description: On Monday, it was announced that Apple will be utilizing Google's Gemini AI models for improving the upcoming version of its Siri digital assistant. This move had a minimal impact on Apple stock. The collaboration highlights Apple's focus on enhancing AI capabilities. The decision to incorporate Google's technology showcases the need for advanced AI systems in today's digital landscape. This partnership signifies a strategic advancement in Apple's journey towards achieving superior AI integration with Siri.
